summary: Phase 3 Deferred Slice 4 is complete. A deterministic versioned custom character transfer module (src/shared/customCharacterTransfer.ts) provides export, import with validation, and stable-id deduplication. Tests cover export package format, corrupt/unsupported input handling, and deduplication. The renderer (src/App.tsx) exposes a minimal text copy/paste UI for export and import without file dialogs, hotkeys, or other forbidden features. Full suite: 128 tests pass, 0 fail. TypeScript check and production build both succeed.
evidence: src/shared/customCharacterTransfer.ts exports CUSTOM_CHARACTER_EXPORT_VERSION=1, exportCustomCharactersPackage, importCustomCharactersPackage, mergeImportedCustomCharacters
src/shared/customCharacterTransfer.test.ts covers deterministic versioned export format, valid import, corrupted/unsupported/invalid input, and stable-id deduplication
src/App.tsx renders Export button, read-only textarea with Copy, import text input with Import button, and result feedback
src/App.tsx has no type='file', showOpenDialog, FileReader, Hotkey, or Plugin references
No src/shared/hotkeys.ts, src/shared/pluginActions.ts, src/main/backend.ts, or src/main/notifications.ts exist
manual_verification_required: Renderer exposes local text copy/paste import/export for custom characters
Exported custom character JSON can be pasted back and imported without duplicates
No native file dialog, file upload, hotkey, plugin, backend, notification, upload, or cloud behavior is present
next_maker_instruction: Do not advance to another Phase 3 backlog item until the human manual gate is approved.
